payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest active memory for Sam in the Goldman context. mem_old was filtered out because it is explicitly superseded by mem_new, and superseded memories are not surfaced as current facts.

entity_resolution.reason: The explanation concerns an existing recalled entity, Sam, in the Goldman context; no new entity creation or merge is required.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned because it is the current active memory about Sam associated with Goldman.
mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current recall.

details: Identified mem_new as the active memory selected for recall.
Identified mem_old as filtered due to supersession.
Preserved the distinction between current and superseded facts.

repair_options: Verify that mem_new and mem_old are linked by an explicit supersedes/is_superseded_by relation.
Ensure recall ranking prefers active memories and excludes superseded ones from current-results views.
If mem_old still appears, reindex or recompute status flags so only the active memory is recallable as current.
